prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. That task isn't bigger than your ability—it’s just been growing in your mind because you’ve been avoiding it. The hardest part is starting, and you’re *right here*, ready to begin. Take a deep breath, take that first step, and trust that momentum will carry you forward. You don’t have to be perfect—just start. Future you will thank present you for showing up. Now go—do the thing! 💪
